text: Welcome to NWS Spades. Two jokers are added, 2♦ and 2♥ are removed, and 2♣ is the lowest card.
Trump order: Big Joker > Little Joker > 2♠ > A♠ > K♠ … > 3♠.
Spades cannot be led until they're broken, unless your hand is only trump.
If you are void in the led suit, you may play a spade to cut. That will break spades for the rest of the game.
Special rules: 10+ bid = 250 points. Blind bid (when down by 100+) = 2× score on success.
